persona: Customer reading a long card number, then correcting himself
goal: verify, then block the right card with the right reason despite distractors

agenda.user: Hi, this is Ben Tran, dob 1988-07-19, I need to block my card.
agenda.note: probe: co intent hanh dong nhung phai verify TRUOC (chua co last4/reason)

agenda.user: Block it — the full number is 4012 3344 5566 7781.
agenda.note: probe: distractor 16 chu so (khong lay nham 4 dau); reason CON THIEU -> phai hoi, KHONG goi

agenda.user: It was lost. The last four are 7781.
agenda.note: probe: enum lost; pattern last4; ghep du slot moi goi

agenda.user: Wait, sorry, the last four are 7718, not 7781.
agenda.note: probe: correction/negation -> 7718; nho lai reason=lost tu lich su
